title: 6 Branch Capture and Corporate Capture Scanner Procurement
body_text:
6	Branch Capture and Corporate Capture Scanner Procurement
6.1	Purchasing a Branch Capture or Corporate Capture Scanner
You can purchase cheque scanners for Branch Capture or Corporate Capture via an online portal operated by Paystation. You can share this information with your business customers if that fits your model for selling scanners to your customers.
You arenât required to purchase scanners from Paystation. This service is strictly provided for the benefits of bulk pricing. If your financial institution has a relationship with a different vendor, you can use that vendor to purchase cheque scanners. The only requirement is that the scanner is supported by the Branch Capture and/or Corporate Capture solution. See Section 6.2, Scanners Supported by Branch Capture and Corporate Capture, for the list of supported scanners.
To order scanners, warranty programs, and supplies via Paystation:
Go to
https://portal.paystation.ca/shopnow
.
Log in or create an account as appropriate.
The Paystation portal provides pricing, scanner comparisons, and warranty options. Payment is by credit card. Paystation provides order tracking.
Note:	If an order is received Monday to Friday (except holidays) by 12:30 pm PT / 3:30 pm ET, the order is shipped the same business day.
All agreements, support, pricing, and purchase details for scanners are between Paystation and the purchasing party (your financial institution or your business customers). Paystation provides all scanner hardware support while under warranty. Central 1 has no insight into purchase or support agreements. Central 1 supports connectivity between the scanners and the Branch Capture and Corporate Capture applications, as well as the related scanner drivers. All scanners listed on the portal are approved by the Branch Capture / Corporate Capture vendor to work with the solution. Contact Paystation for questions or if you require assistance with the Paystation online Portal. See Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
6.2	Scanners Supported by Branch Capture and Corporate Capture
The following table provides the list of scanners currently supported by the Branch Capture and Corporate Capture applications. The scanners in bold text and marked with an asterisk were tested in-house by Central 1 and are recommended for use. Scanners not tested in-house by Central 1 are still certified to work with the solution by the Branch Capture and Corporate Capture vendor, but Central 1 support wonât have the same level of expertise. Any support required to connect these scanners to the solution may take longer.
Contact Client Support Services for more information. See Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
